title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama/ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama server.

title: ollama/ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for the Ollama server.

title: langchain-ai/langchain (Ollama integration)
summary: LangChain LLM integration that calls Ollama models via the local REST API.

title: jmorganca/ollama-gui
summary: Minimal web UI for chatting with Ollama models, built with SvelteKit.

title: ollama-webui/ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich open-source WebUI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI).

title: rikkrizzle/ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that forwards user prompts to a local Ollama instance and streams replies.

title: kevinwuhoo/ollama-cli
summary: Simple interactive CLI wrapper around the Ollama REST API written in Go.

title: ollama/ollama-main
summary: Official Docker image for running Ollama server in a container.

title: sgmunn/ollama-swift
summary: Swift package that wraps the Ollama REST API for macOS/iOS apps.

title: ollama4j/ollama4j
summary: Community Java client for Ollama with fluent API and Kotlin extensions.

title: ollama-r/ollamar
summary: R package providing a native interface to Ollama models.

title: ollama-npm/ollama
summary: Unofficial zero-dependency npm wrapper for the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-pypi/ollama-pythonic
summary: Lightweight PyPI package that exposes Ollama endpoints with Pydantic models.

title: ollama-rs/ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate for interacting with the Ollama HTTP API using async/await.

title: ollama-haystack (deepset-ai)
summary: Haystack integration that lets pipelines use Ollama models as generators.

title: ollama-autogen (microsoft)
summary: Microsoft AutoGen sample showing how to plug Ollama models into multi-agent conversations.

title: ollama-copilot (thomas-yan)
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-obsidian (joeyscat)
summary: Obsidian plugin to query local Ollama models from within notes.

title: ollama-slack (nickwilkie)
summary: Slack bot that streams Ollama responses into threads using Socket Mode.
